title: AI System Design: From Idea to Production - Apoorva Joshi, MongoDB
summary: Apoorva Joshi presents a structured framework for designing AI systems from idea to production, arguing that identifying the business problem, defining success metrics, and selecting appropriate architecture are more critical than coding ability. The talk addresses why most AI systems fail to reach production due to poor early-stage decisions and demonstrates the framework applied to real-world problems.
writeup: Apoorva Joshi of MongoDB lays out a structured framework for taking AI systems from idea to production, contending that identifying the business problem, defining success metrics, and choosing the right architecture matter more than coding ability. The talk attributes most AI systems' failure to reach production to poor early-stage decisions, and it walks through the framework applied to real-world problems. Concepts covered include system design, edge deployment, success metrics, hybrid architecture, and model evaluation.
